creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ale         2009-11-02 10:11:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases/sqlite3    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    databases/sqlite3/files patch-Makefile.in 
  Added files:
    databases/sqlite3/files pthread_equal_stub 
  Removed files:
    databases/sqlite3/files fts3_patch-Makefile.in 
                            patch-src__main.c pkgIndex.tcl 
  Log:
  Update sqlite3 to 3.6.19 release:
  - fix thread-safe support (does it make sense to have an option to disable it?)
  - add R*Tree index OPTION
  - rework/simplify the port
  
  PR:             ports/139276
  Submitted by:   ale
  Approved by:    maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.39      +22 -35    ports/databases/sqlite3/Makefile
